scores.correctness_notes: Events match (certificate_available, certificate_denied). However, the agent describes the older TLSCertificatesRequiresV4 API rather than the current charmlibs-interfaces-tls-certificates v1 library specified in the gold standard. Misses key gold standard details: error codes (ip_not_allowed 101, domain_not_allowed 102, etc.), revocation handling, and CSR/databag interface contract. The automatic renewal via secret_expired is a v4-specific feature not in the gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — TLSCertificatesRequiresV4, CertificateRequestAttributes, Mode.UNIT, renewal_relative_time, refresh_events are all real APIs in the charm-tls-certificates v4 library, just not the current recommended library version
